name: Golden Prawn 933
desc_id: Restoran seafood panggung di atas air yang melegenda lintas generasi, favorit turis Singapura dan Malaysia. Cocok untuk rombongan besar dengan kepiting saus padang, udang mentega, dan gonggong rebus.
desc_en: A legendary stilted seafood restaurant over the water, a favourite of Singaporean and Malaysian tourists. Great for big groups with chili-padang crab, butter prawns, and boiled gonggong.
signature: Kepiting saus padang, kepiting lada hitam, udang mentega/cereal, gonggong rebus, sotong
address: 525P+RX9, Jl. Golden City Jaya, Tj. Buntung, Kec. Bengkong, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29458
desc_zh: 传奇水上吊脚楼海鲜餐厅，几代人的最爱，深受新加坡和马来西亚游客欢迎。适合大团聚餐，招牌有巴东辣椒蟹、牛油虾和白灼香螺(gonggong)。

name: Rezeki Seafood Restaurant
desc_id: Restoran kelong di atas laut sejak 1980-an, favorit warga lokal dan hanya 5–10 menit dari Bandara Hang Nadim. Chili crab-nya disebut salah satu yang terbaik di pulau ini.
desc_en: A seafood restaurant on stilts over the sea since the 1980s, a local favourite just 5–10 minutes from Hang Nadim Airport. Its chili crab is hailed as one of the best on the island.
signature: Chili crab, black pepper crab, udang telur asin, steam prawn, assam fish, gonggong
address: Pantai, Jl. H. Moh. Saleh, RT.002/RW.001, Batu Besar, Nongsa, Batam City, Riau Islands 29465
desc_zh: 建于1980年代的海上吊脚楼海鲜餐厅，本地人最爱，距汉那丁机场仅5至10分钟车程。其辣椒蟹被誉为全岛数一数二。

name: Wey Wey Live Seafood
desc_id: Seafood tepi laut paling dikenal di Harbour Bay, hanya beberapa menit dari terminal feri dan ramai turis Singapura-Malaysia. Andalannya kepiting telur asin/lada hitam dan udang cereal.
desc_en: The best-known seaside seafood spot at Harbour Bay, just minutes from the ferry terminal and packed with Singaporean-Malaysian tourists. Salted-egg/black-pepper crab and cereal prawns are the stars.
signature: Kepiting telur asin, kepiting lada hitam, udang cereal/mentega, scallop, ikan bakar, otak-otak
address: 5X3X+26W, Harbour Bay Downtown Sei Jodoh, Jl. Duyung, Sungai Jodoh, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau
desc_zh: Harbour Bay最知名的海边海鲜餐厅，距渡轮码头仅几分钟，常常坐满新马游客。咸蛋黄/黑胡椒螃蟹和麦片虾是这里的招牌。

name: Sei Enam Seafood
desc_id: Restoran seafood legendaris sejak 1970-an dengan meja bundar berputar ala Tionghoa, sering dipuji sebagai seafood terenak di Batam untuk yang mengutamakan rasa di atas harga.
desc_en: A legendary seafood restaurant since the 1970s with Chinese-style rotating round tables, often praised as the best-tasting seafood in Batam for those who value flavour over price.
signature: Kepiting saus Sei Enam, sotong goreng asam, udang kipas merica putih, kakap asam pedas, gonggong pedas
address: Komplek Ruko Mahkota Raya, Jl. Raja H. Fisabilillah, RW.2, Tlk. Tering, Kec. Batam Kota, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29461
desc_zh: 始于1970年代的传奇海鲜餐厅，配备中式旋转圆桌，常被赞为巴淡岛最好吃的海鲜，适合重味道多过价钱的食客。

name: Gerai Nelayan 2M & Kelong Arjam
desc_id: Restoran panggung di pesisir utara Batam yang butuh lebih dari 70 kg gonggong per minggu, dipasok nelayan dari Pulau Buluh dan Rempang. Banyak dikunjungi wisatawan luar negeri.
desc_en: A stilted restaurant on Batam's north coast that goes through over 70 kg of gonggong a week, supplied by fishermen from Buluh and Rempang islands. Popular with foreign visitors.
address: Kampung Tua Mentarau, pesisir utara Pulau Batam
desc_zh: 位于巴淡岛北岸的吊脚楼餐厅，每周消耗超过70公斤香螺(gonggong)，由Buluh岛和Rempang岛的渔民供应，深受外国游客欢迎。

name: Barelang Seafood Restaurant
desc_id: Tujuan makan seafood dengan pemandangan Jembatan Barelang dan sunset; pilih seafood segar langsung di lokasi. Sering dikunjungi pejabat.
desc_en: A seafood destination with views of the Barelang Bridge and sunset; pick your fresh seafood on the spot. Frequented by officials.
signature: Siput gonggong, flower crab, scallop with garlic, kerapu steam, udang nestum
address: Jalan Trans Barelang City, Tembesi, Kec. Sagulung, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29472
desc_zh: 可一边欣赏巴蓝降大桥(Barelang Bridge)和日落一边品尝海鲜的好去处，现场挑选新鲜海产，连官员也常光顾。

name: Kopak Jaya 007 Kelong Seafood
desc_id: Pengalaman makan kelong paling atmosferik di Barelang: di atas laut, sunset, dan pilih seafood langsung dari tank. Destination dining sesungguhnya.
desc_en: The most atmospheric kelong dining in Barelang: over the sea, sunset views, and seafood picked straight from the tank. True destination dining.
signature: Sotong saus padang, kerang hijau bakar, udang segar
address: Jl. Kp. Tua Tiangwangkang, Tembesi, Sagulung, Batam City, Riau Islands 29472
desc_zh: 巴蓝降(Barelang)氛围感最强的海上吊脚楼(kelong)用餐体验：临海、看日落、从水缸里现挑海鲜，真正值得专程一去。

name: Harbour Bay Seafood Restaurant
desc_id: Perpaduan kuliner Indonesia-Tionghoa di tepi Harbour Bay dengan view matahari terbenam dan live music di akhir pekan.
desc_en: A blend of Indonesian-Chinese cuisine on the Harbour Bay waterfront with sunset views and weekend live music.
address: Harbour Bay, Jl. Duyung, Batu Ampar
desc_zh: 坐落Harbour Bay海滨，融合印尼与中式风味，可赏日落，周末还有现场音乐。

name: Love Seafood Batam Centre
desc_id: Salah satu restoran seafood paling ramai di Batam Centre dengan area dine-in luas, ramah rombongan, dan penyajian cepat. Udang segarnya jadi bintang.
desc_en: One of the busiest seafood restaurants in Batam Centre, with spacious dine-in seating, group-friendly service, and quick serving. Fresh prawns steal the show.
signature: Udang segar, aneka kepiting, ikan bakar
address: Jl. Raja H. Fisabilillah No.12B, Teluk Tering, Batam Kota, Batam City, Riau Islands 29444
desc_zh: 巴淡中心(Batam Centre)人气最旺的海鲜餐厅之一，堂食空间宽敞，适合团体，上菜快，新鲜大虾最抢镜。

name: Nomnom Seafood
desc_id: Gerai seafood di 168 Food Court Seraya yang dikenal dengan gonggong, aneka udang, dan petai. Harga ramah kantong.
desc_en: A seafood stall at 168 Food Court Seraya known for gonggong, assorted prawns, and petai. Wallet-friendly prices.
address: 168 Food Court Seraya, Batu Ampar
desc_zh: 位于Seraya 168美食广场的海鲜摊，以香螺(gonggong)、各式鲜虾和臭豆(petai)闻名，价格亲民。

name: D'Steam Seafood
desc_id: Salah satu rujukan seafood steam terbaik di Batam menurut ulasan turis di TripAdvisor.
desc_en: Rated one of the best for steamed seafood in Batam by tourist reviews on TripAdvisor.
address: Batam
desc_zh: 据TripAdvisor游客评价，是巴淡岛清蒸海鲜数一数二的好去处。

name: RM Yong Kee Istimewa
desc_id: Ikon sup ikan Batam yang menyebut diri pelopor sup seafood di Indonesia; kuah bening segar dengan ikan tenggiri, sangat ramai saat makan siang. Hati-hati ada warung tiruan di sebelah.
desc_en: The icon of Batam fish soup, billing itself as the pioneer of seafood soup in Indonesia; clear, fresh broth with mackerel, packed at lunchtime. Beware the copycat stall next door.
signature: Sup ikan tenggiri, sup ikan campur (ikan+udang+cumi), otak-otak
address: Komp. Hup Seng Blok A No. 5-8, Batam Centre; outlet Nagoya City Centre Blok E No. 8-9
desc_zh: 巴淡岛鱼汤(sup ikan)的招牌老店，自称印尼海鲜汤的开创者；汤底清澈鲜甜配马鲛鱼，午市常常座无虚席。注意隔壁有山寨档口。

name: Sop Ikan Aliang (Kedai Kopi Aliang)
desc_id: Hidden gem tanpa papan nama di Nongsa dekat pos polisi; sup ikan murni atau campur dengan bihun yang sering habis menjelang siang.
desc_en: A signless hidden gem in Nongsa near the police post; pure or mixed fish soup with vermicelli that often sells out by midday.
signature: Sup ikan murni, sup ikan campur, bihun
address: Ruko Summerland Nongsa B2-15, Batu Besar, Nongsa
desc_zh: 藏身Nongsa警岗附近、连招牌都没有的隐世小店；纯鱼汤或杂锦鱼汤配米粉，常常未到中午就售罄。

name: Sop Ikan Kok Heng
desc_id: Sop ikan legendaris di kawasan Penuin dengan porsi ikan yang melimpah, buka dari pagi sampai malam.
desc_en: A legendary fish soup in the Penuin area with generous portions of fish, open from morning to night.
address: Jl. Komp. Penuin Centre, Batu Selicin, Lubuk Baja
desc_zh: Penuin一带的传奇鱼汤店，鱼料分量十足，从早营业到晚。

name: Hokkian Sop Ikan (Kedai Kopi Sudi Mampir)
desc_id: Kedai sop ikan berusia sekitar 30 tahun di Nagoya dengan sop ikan original dan sop ikan laksa.
desc_en: A fish soup stall of about 30 years in Nagoya, serving original fish soup and fish soup laksa.
signature: Sop ikan original, sop ikan laksa
address: Komplek Bumi Indah Blok F No.12, Nagoya
desc_zh: Nagoya一间约30年历史的鱼汤老店，供应原味鱼汤和叻沙鱼汤。

name: Sop Ikan & Asam Pedas Windsor
desc_id: Sop ikan legendaris di Komplek Windsor Central, Lubuk Baja, dengan andalan sop ikan dan asam pedas.
desc_en: A legendary fish soup at Windsor Central, Lubuk Baja, with fish soup and asam pedas as the mainstays.
address: Komplek Windsor Central, Jl. Imam Bonjol No.18, Lubuk Baja
desc_zh: 位于Lubuk Baja的Windsor Central的传奇鱼汤店，招牌是鱼汤和亚参鱼(asam pedas)。

name: Mie Terempa'K (Mie Tarempa Sungai Panas)
desc_id: Alamat paling aman untuk mencicipi mie tarempa gepeng bumbu pedas-manis-gurih dengan topping ikan tongkol, plus luti gendang yang wajib coba. Sangat representatif identitas kuliner Kepri.
desc_en: The safest address to try flat tarempa noodles in a sweet-savoury-spicy sauce topped with tuna, plus the must-try luti gendang. Deeply representative of Riau Islands food culture.
address: Komp. Graha Mas, Jl. Laksamana Bintan Komp. Pertokoan Seruni No.10-11, Sungai Panas, Kec. Batam Kota, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29433
desc_zh: 品尝达临巴扁面(mie tarempa)最稳妥的地址，甜咸微辣酱汁配金枪鱼，再加必试的鱼酥饼(luti gendang)，最能代表廖内群岛的饮食文化。

name: Kedai Kopi Harum Manis
desc_id: Sarapan legendaris Batam: mie lendir (mie kuning + kuah kacang kental + telur rebus), nasi kari, prata, dan kopi tarik. Datang pagi karena menu andalan cepat habis.
desc_en: A legendary Batam breakfast: mee lendir (yellow noodles in thick peanut gravy with boiled egg), curry rice, prata, and kopi tarik. Come early as the signature dishes sell out.
signature: Mie lendir, nasi kari, prata, kopi tarik
address: Jl. Komp. Bumi Indah No.Blok F, RW.10, Lubuk Baja Kota, Kec. Lubuk Baja, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29432
desc_zh: 巴淡岛传奇早餐：黏面(mie lendir，黄面配浓花生酱汁加水煮蛋)、咖喱饭、印度煎饼(prata)和拉茶(kopi tarik)。招牌菜很快售罄，记得早到。

name: Pusat Luti Gendang
desc_id: Toko luti gendang khas Kepri, roti goreng isi abon ikan tuna/bilis/udang, tersebar dengan pusat di Belian dan gerai Bengkong Laut yang buka 24 jam.
desc_en: A specialist for luti gendang, the Riau Islands fried bread stuffed with tuna/anchovy/shrimp floss, with a hub in Belian and a 24-hour Bengkong Laut outlet.
address: Botania Road No.1, Belian; Bengkong Laut (Komp. YKB Blok D15, 24 jam); Sungai Panas
desc_zh: 专卖廖内群岛特色鱼酥饼(luti gendang)的店——油炸面包夹金枪鱼/江鱼仔/虾肉松，以Belian为总店，Bengkong Laut分店24小时营业。

name: Nasi Ayam Budi Siang Malam
desc_id: Chicken rice Batam paling terkenal dan stabil untuk turis: nasi harum, ayam empuk, sambal mantap, buka 24 jam. Legendaris lebih dari 15 tahun.
desc_en: Batam's most famous and consistent chicken rice for tourists: fragrant rice, tender chicken, great sambal, open 24 hours. A legend of over 15 years.
signature: Nasi ayam hainan, ayam rebus/panggang, sambal
address: Komplek Penuin Centre, Blk. D No.08, Batu Selicin, Kec. Lubuk Baja, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29444
desc_zh: 巴淡岛最有名、最稳定的海南鸡饭，游客首选：饭香、鸡嫩、参巴酱(sambal)出色，24小时营业，称霸超过15年的老字号。

name: Papa Kopitiam
desc_id: Nasi ayam hainan dengan resep dari Singapura sejak 1986 di Bengkong Laut, halal.
desc_en: Hainanese chicken rice from a Singapore recipe since 1986 in Bengkong Laut, halal.
address: Ruko Golden City Blok C No.01, Bengkong Laut
desc_zh: 传承新加坡食谱的海南鸡饭，自1986年扎根Bengkong Laut，清真。

name: Nasi Ayam Ciang Hau
desc_id: Nasi ayam hainan porsi besar dengan cita rasa ala Singapura di kawasan Mitra Raya, Batam Kota.
desc_en: Generous-portion Hainanese chicken rice with a Singaporean flavour in the Mitra Raya area, Batam Kota.
address: Ruko Jl. Mitra Raya Blok No.9, Teluk Tering, Batam Kota
desc_zh: 位于巴淡市Mitra Raya一带的海南鸡饭，分量大，带新加坡风味。

name: Nasi Ayam Laupa
desc_id: Nasi ayam hainan dengan nasi gurih dan aroma kaldu yang kuat di Lubuk Baja.
desc_en: Hainanese chicken rice with savoury rice and a strong broth aroma in Lubuk Baja.
address: Komplek Srijaya Abadi Blok B No.4, Lubuk Baja
desc_zh: Lubuk Baja的海南鸡饭，鸡饭油香十足，鸡汤香气浓郁。

name: Nasi Ayam Oki 118
desc_id: Nasi ayam hainan dengan ayam lembut dan porsi besar di Harbour Bay Ferry Terminal (Kampoeng Mama), praktis sebelum naik feri.
desc_en: Hainanese chicken rice with tender chicken and big portions at Harbour Bay Ferry Terminal (Kampoeng Mama), handy before boarding the ferry.
address: Harbour Bay Ferry Terminal (Kampoeng Mama), Batu Ampar
desc_zh: 位于Harbour Bay渡轮码头(Kampoeng Mama)的海南鸡饭，鸡肉鲜嫩、分量大，登船前来一份正合适。

name: Nasi Ayam Hengky
desc_id: Nasi ayam hainan dan bubur di Indoor Nagoya Foodcourt, halal, buka dari pagi hingga malam.
desc_en: Hainanese chicken rice and porridge at the Indoor Nagoya Foodcourt, halal, open morning to night.
address: Indoor Nagoya Foodcourt, Nagoya
desc_zh: Nagoya室内美食广场内的海南鸡饭与粥品，清真，从早营业到晚。

name: Kedai Kopi Ameng
desc_id: Kopitiam legendaris asal Belakang Padang sejak 1980 dengan teh tarik dingin yang disebut terbaik di Batam, kini punya 5-6 cabang. Sarapan Melayu seperti mie lendir, lontong sayur, dan nasi lemak.
desc_en: A legendary kopitiam from Belakang Padang since 1980 whose iced teh tarik is called the best in Batam, now with 5-6 branches. Malay breakfasts like mee lendir, lontong sayur, and nasi lemak.
signature: Teh tarik dingin, mie lendir, lontong sayur, nasi lemak, roti kirai
address: Cabang: SummerCoast Tiban, Paragon Hill Batam Centre, Sagulung, Nagoya 888, Bengkong
desc_zh: 源自Belakang Padang、始于1980年的传奇咖啡店(kopitiam)，冰拉茶被誉为巴淡岛最好喝，如今已有五六家分店。供应黏面、椰浆菜饭(lontong sayur)、椰浆饭(nasi lemak)等马来式早餐。

name: Mentari Kopitiam Pasir Putih
desc_id: Kopitiam yang sedang booming di Pasar Pasir Putih, kuat untuk nasi lemak, laksa, dan roti bakar dengan ruang luas dan terang.
desc_en: A currently booming kopitiam at Pasar Pasir Putih, strong on nasi lemak, laksa, and toast, with a large, bright space.
address: Batam Centre, Pasar Pasir Putih C No.10-12, Sadai, Bengkong, Batam City, Riau Islands 29444
desc_zh: Pasir Putih市场内正当红的咖啡店，椰浆饭(nasi lemak)、叻沙和烤面包最出彩，空间宽敞明亮。

name: Atok's Coffee
desc_id: Kopitiam modern yang nyaman untuk keluarga dan tamu hotel tapi tetap kuat pada menu Melayu lokal, dengan kopi sanger dan butter coffee yang dipuji. WiFi kencang dan terjangkau.
desc_en: A modern kopitiam comfortable for families and hotel guests yet still strong on local Malay dishes, with praised kopi sanger and butter coffee. Fast WiFi and affordable.
signature: Kopi sanger, butter coffee, nasi lemak, prata, mie lendir, roti bakar
address: Ruko Royal Sincom Blok.F No.18-19, Batam Center, Tlk. Tering, Kec. Batam Kota, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29444
desc_zh: 现代风咖啡店，适合家庭和酒店住客，却依旧主打本地马来料理，三花咖啡(kopi sanger)和牛油咖啡广受好评。WiFi快、价格实惠。

name: Kedai Kopi Medan
desc_id: Sarapan ekonomis populer di Nagoya untuk lopis, mee soto, lontong, nasi uduk, dan kway tiao goreng dengan wok hei.
desc_en: A popular budget breakfast in Nagoya for lopis, mee soto, lontong, nasi uduk, and fried kway tiao with wok hei.
signature: Lopis, mee soto, lontong, nasi uduk, kway tiao goreng
address: Jl. Imam Bonjol-Nagoya No.17, Lubuk Baja Kota, Kec. Lubuk Baja, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29444
desc_zh: Nagoya人气经济早餐店，主打lopis糯米糕、马来面汤(mee soto)、椰浆糕(lontong)、香饭(nasi uduk)和带镬气的炒粿条。

name: Kopi Gembira
desc_id: Kopitiam legendaris sekitar 20 tahun di kawasan Nagoya.
desc_en: A legendary kopitiam of around 20 years in the Nagoya area.
address: Nagoya Kopitiam, Nagoya
desc_zh: Nagoya一带约20年历史的传奇咖啡店。

name: Anambas Kopitiam Nagoya
desc_id: Kopi kental khas Melayu-Tionghoa dengan roti bakar, kaya toast, nasi lemak, dan martabak di Lubuk Baja.
desc_en: Thick Malay-Chinese coffee with toast, kaya toast, nasi lemak, and martabak in Lubuk Baja.
signature: Kopi kental, roti bakar kaya, nasi lemak, martabak
address: Jl. Komp. Bumi Indah, Lubuk Baja Kota
desc_zh: Lubuk Baja的马来华人风味浓咖啡，配烤面包、咖椰(kaya)吐司、椰浆饭和煎饼(martabak)。

name: Cafe Lim Kok Tong
desc_id: Cabang kopi otentik sejak 1925 dari Pematang Siantar yang hadir di Nagoya.
desc_en: A branch of authentic coffee since 1925 from Pematang Siantar, now in Nagoya.
address: Nagoya
desc_zh: 源自Pematang Siantar、始于1925年的正宗咖啡品牌，如今落户Nagoya。

name: Sin Wei Kopitiam
desc_id: Kopitiam terkenal dengan char siew dan sio bak yang disebut roast pork terbaik di Batam, plus nasi hainan. Non-halal.
desc_en: A kopitiam famous for char siew and sio bak hailed as the best roast pork in Batam, plus Hainan rice. Non-halal.
signature: Char siew, sio bak, nasi hainan
address: Ruko Penuin Center Blok V No.12, Batu Selicin, Nagoya
desc_zh: 以叉烧和烧肉(sio bak，被誉为巴淡岛最好的烧肉)闻名的咖啡店，另有海南饭。非清真。

name: Nagoya Thamrin Kopitiam / Food Market
desc_id: Kopitiam dan food market full AC di Nagoya Thamrin City dengan masakan nusantara dan chinese, harga terjangkau.
desc_en: A fully air-conditioned kopitiam and food market at Nagoya Thamrin City with Indonesian and Chinese dishes at affordable prices.
address: Nagoya Thamrin City, Jl. Imam Bonjol
desc_zh: Nagoya Thamrin City内全冷气的咖啡店兼美食广场，供应印尼群岛料理和中式菜，价格实惠。

name: Martabak Har
desc_id: Martabak dan prata India legendaris yang buka 24 jam; martabak kambing/sapi/ayam, roti canai, nasi briyani, dan teh tarik. Camilan malam ikonik Batam.
desc_en: A legendary Indian martabak and prata spot open 24 hours; mutton/beef/chicken martabak, roti canai, briyani rice, and teh tarik. An iconic Batam late-night snack.
signature: Martabak kambing, martabak telur, roti prata/canai, nasi briyani, teh tarik
address: Komplek Bumi Indah, Jl. Imam Bonjol Blok B No.9-10, Lubuk Baja (cabang Jodoh & Botania)
desc_zh: 24小时营业的传奇印度煎饼(martabak)与印度甩饼(prata)店；羊肉/牛肉/鸡肉煎饼、印度抛饼(roti canai)、印度香饭(briyani)和拉茶应有尽有，是巴淡岛标志性的宵夜。

name: Putri Prata
desc_id: Gerai prata dengan varian pisang, mentega, dan telur di beberapa lokasi Batam.
desc_en: A prata stall with banana, butter, and egg variants at several Batam locations.
signature: Prata pisang, prata mentega, prata telur
address: Hopeng Kopitiam Pasar Mitra 2, Batam Kota; Cahaya Garden Bengkong
desc_zh: 印度煎饼(prata)摊，有香蕉、牛油和鸡蛋等口味，在巴淡岛多处设点。

name: Maharani Prata

desc_en: Wallet-friendly smashed fried chicken, chicken noodles, and meatballs in Batam Centre.
address: Ruko KBC Blok D1 No.10-15, Batam Centre
desc_zh: 巴淡中心的平价拍扁炸鸡、鸡肉面和肉丸。

name: Merah Putih Ayam Kampung
desc_id: Ayam kampung goreng dan tongseng di Batam.
desc_en: Free-range fried chicken and tongseng in Batam.
address: Jl. Engku Putri, Teluk Tering, Batam Kota
desc_zh: 巴淡岛的炸走地鸡(ayam kampung)和羊肉浓汤(tongseng)。

name: Pujasera Tiban Center
desc_id: Pujasera dengan ayam penyet dan es cendol kampung di Tiban Indah, Sekupang.
desc_en: A food court with smashed fried chicken and village-style cendol ice in Tiban Indah, Sekupang.
address: Jl. Gajah Mada, Tiban Indah, Sekupang
desc_zh: Sekupang的Tiban Indah的美食广场,主打拍扁炸鸡和乡村风珍多冰(es cendol)。

name: Pecal Sabar Menanti
desc_id: Lontong pecel bumbu kacang dengan gorengan di Pasar Mustafa, Belian.
desc_en: Lontong pecel in peanut sauce with fritters at Pasar Mustafa, Belian.
address: Pasar Mustafa, Jl. Raja Alikelana, Belian, Batam Kota
desc_zh: Belian的Pasar Mustafa,花生酱拌饭团(lontong pecel)配炸物。

name: Nasi Lemak & Lontong Kampoeng Noodle
desc_id: Resep sejak 1978 dengan nasi lemak, lontong sayur, dan kue di Mitra Raya 2, Batam Kota.
desc_en: Recipes since 1978 with nasi lemak, lontong sayur, and cakes in Mitra Raya 2, Batam Kota.
address: Mitra Raya 2 Blok A-B.12A-12B & B.15, Batam Kota
desc_zh: 始于1978年的食谱,供应椰浆饭(nasi lemak)、椰浆菜饭(lontong sayur)和糕点,位于巴淡市Mitra Raya 2。

name: Gado-gado & Nasi Lemak Pelantar 3 (MB Kopitiam Pasir Putih)
desc_id: Legendaris dari Tanjungpinang sejak 1998 (generasi ke-2/3) dengan nasi lemak hemat dan gado-gado di Pasar Pasir Putih.
desc_en: A legend from Tanjungpinang since 1998 (2nd/3rd generation) with budget nasi lemak and gado-gado at Pasar Pasir Putih.
address: MB Kopitiam, Pasar Pasir Putih, Bengkong
desc_zh: 源自丹戎槟榔、始于1998年的传奇老店(已传至第二/三代),Pasir Putih市场内的平价椰浆饭和加多加多(gado-gado)。

name: RM Amel Seafood
desc_id: Sarapan Melayu tepi Pantai Nongsa lebih dari 20 tahun: gado-gado, mie lendir, prata, dan nasi lemak.
desc_en: Malay breakfast on Nongsa Beach for over 20 years: gado-gado, mee lendir, prata, and nasi lemak.
signature: Gado-gado, mie lendir, prata, nasi lemak
address: Pantai Nongsa
desc_zh: Nongsa海滩边经营超过20年的马来式早餐:加多加多(gado-gado)、黏面(mie lendir)、印度煎饼(prata)和椰浆饭(nasi lemak)。

name: Nasi Lemak Wak Tige
desc_id: Nasi lemak dengan telur omega/bebek leleh di Bengkong Sadai, halal.
desc_en: Nasi lemak with omega-egg/molten duck egg in Bengkong Sadai, halal.
address: Bengkong Sadai Blok A No.10 (sebelah Alfamart Kantor Camat Bengkong)
desc_zh: Bengkong Sadai的椰浆饭(nasi lemak),配omega蛋/流心鸭蛋,清真。

name: Kek Pisang Villa
desc_id: Pelopor kek pisang Batam sejak 2006 dengan aneka topping, oleh-oleh wajib sebelum pulang. Tersedia di banyak outlet termasuk Bandara Hang Nadim.
desc_en: The pioneer of Batam banana cake since 2006 with various toppings, a must-buy souvenir before leaving. Available at many outlets including Hang Nadim Airport.
address: Outlet: Batam Centre, Nagoya (Jl. Imam Bonjol No.51), Botania, Tiban, Batu Aji, Bandara Hang Nadim
desc_zh: 始于2006年的巴淡岛香蕉蛋糕(kek pisang)开创者,口味繁多,离岛前必买伴手礼。多处门店有售,包括汉那丁机场。

name: Lapisa Nagoya Hill
desc_id: Layer cake modern Batam berating sangat tinggi, buttery dan lembut, sangat praktis sebagai oleh-oleh dari Nagoya Hill. Staf ramah dan sampling konsisten dipuji.
desc_en: A very highly-rated modern Batam layer cake, buttery and soft, extremely convenient as a souvenir from Nagoya Hill. Friendly staff and sampling consistently praised.
address: Pintu Masuk Timur, Jl. Nagoya Hill, Lubuk Baja Kota, Kec. Lubuk Baja, Kota Batam, Kepulauan Riau 29444
desc_zh: 评价极高的现代巴淡岛千层蛋糕(layer cake),牛油香浓、口感绵软,在Nagoya Hill购买极为方便。店员亲切、试吃稳定,口碑相传。

name: Bingka Bakar Nayadam
desc_id: Bingka bakar dan kue bilis khas Batam di Sagulung dan Batam Centre.
desc_en: Grilled bingka and anchovy crackers from Batam in Sagulung and Batam Centre.
address: Jl. Tembesi, Buana Bukit Permata Mutiara No.26, Sagulung (juga Ruko Puri Legenda Blok D1 No.03, Batam Centre)
desc_zh: Sagulung和巴淡中心的巴淡岛特色烤班加糕(bingka bakar)和江鱼仔饼(kue bilis)。

name: Lamoist Layers Cake
desc_id: Kue lapis lembut aneka rasa di Hypermart Nagoya dan Mall BCS.
desc_en: Soft layer cake in various flavours at Hypermart Nagoya and BCS Mall.
address: Hypermart Nagoya & Mall BCS
desc_zh: Hypermart Nagoya和BCS Mall的多口味绵软千层蛋糕。

name: Batam Ogura
desc_id: Cake ogura yang airy dengan banyak outlet termasuk di Bandara.
desc_en: Airy ogura cake with many outlets including at the airport.
address: Outlet: Nagoya, Batam Centre, Panbil Mall, Tiban Centre, Plaza Fanindo, Bandara
desc_zh: 口感轻盈的相思蛋糕(ogura cake),多处门店有售,包括机场。

name: Mamma Otak-otak
desc_id: Otak-otak resep turun-temurun sejak 1982 di Penuin, Lubuk Baja.
desc_en: Otak-otak from a family recipe since 1982 in Penuin, Lubuk Baja.
address: Jl. Pembangunan, Penuin, Batu Selicin, Lubuk Baja
desc_zh: Lubuk Baja的Penuin,始于1982年祖传食谱的乌达(otak-otak)。

name: Acong Otak-otak
desc_id: Otak-otak ikan tenggiri bungkus daun kelapa khas Batam.
desc_en: Mackerel otak-otak wrapped in coconut leaf, a Batam specialty.
address: Batam
desc_zh: 椰叶包裹的马鲛鱼乌达(otak-otak),巴淡岛特色。

name: Epok-Epok Ana
desc_id: Epok-epok atau pastel isi kentang, sarden, dan telur di Bengkong Laut.
desc_en: Epok-epok (curry puffs) filled with potato, sardine, and egg in Bengkong Laut.
address: Bengkong Laut, Bengkong
desc_zh: Bengkong Laut的咖喱角(epok-epok),内馅有马铃薯、沙丁鱼和鸡蛋。

name: Anchor Cafe & Roastery
desc_id: Cafe specialty coffee yang me-roasting biji kopi Gayo/Mandailing/Toraja sendiri di Sukajadi, Batam Kota.
desc_en: A specialty coffee cafe roasting its own Gayo/Mandailing/Toraja beans in Sukajadi, Batam Kota.
address: Ruko Dermaga Culinary Blok RF No.11, Sukajadi, Batam Kota
desc_zh: 自家烘焙Gayo/Mandailing/Toraja咖啡豆的精品咖啡馆,位于巴淡市Sukajadi。

name: The Smith
desc_id: Cafe dessert dengan mille crepes, red velvet, dan macaroon di BCS, Mega Mall, dan Nagoya Hill.
desc_en: A dessert cafe with mille crepes, red velvet, and macarons at BCS, Mega Mall, and Nagoya Hill.
address: BCS, Mega Mall, Nagoya Hill
desc_zh: 甜品咖啡馆,供应千层可丽饼(mille crepes)、红丝绒和马卡龙,设点于BCS、Mega Mall和Nagoya Hill。

name: Roemah Pohon
desc_id: Cafe berkonsep menyatu dengan pepohonan, semi-outdoor di Batu Besar, Nongsa.
desc_en: A cafe with a concept blending into the trees, semi-outdoor in Batu Besar, Nongsa.
address: Batu Besar, Nongsa
desc_zh: 以与树木融为一体为概念的半户外咖啡馆,位于Nongsa的Batu Besar。

name: Pantai Cafe
desc_id: Cafe dengan live music dan view pantai di Tanjung Uma, buka sore hingga dini hari.
desc_en: A cafe with live music and beach views in Tanjung Uma, open evening to early morning.
address: Komplek Pantai Permata Blok E No.1-6, Tanjung Uma
desc_zh: Tanjung Uma的咖啡馆,有现场音乐和海滩景观,从傍晚营业到凌晨。

name: Chemistree
desc_id: Cafe dengan pohon besar di tengah ruangan dan jembatan kaca di Belian.
desc_en: A cafe with a large tree in the centre of the room and a glass bridge in Belian.
address: Jl. Kw. Industri Tunas No.1, Belian
desc_zh: Belian的咖啡馆,室内中央有一棵大树,还设有玻璃桥。

name: Liminal Coffee + Bites
desc_id: Cafe kopi dan camilan di The Promenade, Harbour Bay Downtown, Batu Ampar.
desc_en: A coffee and bites cafe at The Promenade, Harbour Bay Downtown, Batu Ampar.
address: The Promenade Blok 8B, Harbour Bay Downtown, Batu Ampar
desc_zh: 位于Batu Ampar的Harbour Bay Downtown的The Promenade的咖啡与小食咖啡馆。

name: Cafe Bukit Cinta (Cabuci)
desc_id: Cafe dengan view kota dari ketinggian di Kampung Pelita, Lubuk Baja.
desc_en: A cafe with elevated city views in Kampung Pelita, Lubuk Baja.
address: Jl. Yos Sudarso, Kp. Pelita, Lubuk Baja
desc_zh: Lubuk Baja的Kampung Pelita,可居高俯瞰城市景色的咖啡馆。

name: Rubeka Rumah Pamer dan Kopi
desc_id: Cafe berkonsep vintage barang antik di Tiban Lama, Sekupang.
desc_en: A cafe with a vintage antique-display concept in Tiban Lama, Sekupang.
address: Tiban Lama, Sekupang
desc_zh: Sekupang的Tiban Lama,以古董陈列为概念的复古咖啡馆。

name: Abun Cha Kue
desc_id: Lapak cha kue yang menonjol lewat menu Cha Kue 3T, cocok untuk pemburu street food khas komunitas Tionghoa lokal. Tersembunyi di belakang Gideon Hotel.
desc_en: A cha kue stall that stands out for its 3T Cha Kue, perfect for hunters of local Chinese community street food. Hidden behind Gideon Hotel.
address: Batu Selicin, Lubuk Baja, Batam City, Riau Islands 29444
desc_zh: 凭招牌Cha Kue 3T脱颖而出的炒粿(cha kue)摊,本地华人社区街头美食爱好者的好去处。藏身Gideon Hotel后方。
